properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The journey that we travel Is a winding narrow road And there are times we stumble 'Neath a heavy load Always there's a voice to tell you You'll never make it in Reminding you of all your failures And long forgotten sin

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You know within your heart God's blood has washed you white as snow Still in your mind the battle rages And threaten all you know But even if you're pushed Beyond where you feel you can't stand Just remember you can put your faith In God's unfailing hand

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You may bend but you won't break You may stumble and even feel You've lost your way But you won't fall; God's word remains You won't be bound by broken chains You can't be bound by broken chains

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Even though a thousand storm May rage within your life You'll find a resting place Within the arms of Christ We've risen far beyond The realm of lying circumstance And nothing formed against this Bride Will ever stand a chance

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Now you don't have to listen When that voice says you're not free God's ordained that you and I Should walk in liberty Freedom's been proclaimed To all the captive and the bound And in Jesus name you can hear those chains Fall broken to the ground Fall broken to the ground
